title: Preclinical lab notebook → regulatory submission
pain_description: Lab notebooks still paper or PDF; data transcribed into GLP reports; reproducibility drops; FDA filings delayed.
incumbent_gap: ELN yes; auto-extraction + regulatory drafting thin
santifer_pattern: ELN ingest + LLM extractor + GLP template generator

title: CRO (contract research org) site coordination
pain_description: 100+ trial sites × dozens of sponsors; site-specific issues + IRB correspondence + deviations. email chains.
santifer_pattern: Site issue intake + classifier + sponsor comms

title: Academic journal peer-review coordination
pain_description: Assigning reviewers + chasing reviews + handling revisions = months per paper; editors burn out.
santifer_pattern: Reviewer DB + LLM match + chase + revision tracker

title: Grant application drafting + budget
pain_description: R01 takes 6-9 months; specific-aims iteration; biosketch + budget + facilities. paper heavy.
santifer_pattern: Aims + literature RAG + LLM drafter + budget builder

title: Bench chemistry synthesis planning + retrosynthesis
pain_description: Synthesis route planning + yield prediction + commercially available building blocks. hours per molecule.
santifer_pattern: Target structure + LLM retrosynthesis + reagent sourcing

title: Bioanalytical lab: LC-MS data validation
pain_description: LC-MS assays for PK studies; peak integration + outlier detection manual; each run audited.
santifer_pattern: Peak data + LLM QC + audit trail

title: Clinical data manager: EDC query resolution
pain_description: EDC throws queries on inconsistent data; resolution via site queries; database lock delayed weeks.
santifer_pattern: Query + context + LLM resolver + site comms

title: Biostatistician SAP + TLF programming
pain_description: Statistical Analysis Plan + tables/listings/figures in SAS; iterative regulatory asks; bottleneck.
santifer_pattern: SAP + data + LLM SAS generator + TLF drafter

title: Regulatory intelligence: monitoring agency guidance
pain_description: FDA / EMA / PMDA issue guidance docs, warning letters, precedents. team reads manually; missing updates = submission rejects.
santifer_pattern: Guidance feed + LLM relevance + brief per product

title: Patent landscape + freedom-to-operate
pain_description: FTO analysis before compound submission; searching patent DBs + literature; days per molecule.
santifer_pattern: Structure + claims parse + LLM FTO memo

title: CMC / manufacturing changes for marketed drugs
pain_description: Manufacturing changes trigger supplement filings; categorization (CBE-0 / CBE-30 / PAS) complex; misfile = enforcement.
santifer_pattern: Change intake + regulatory rule + filing drafter

title: Pharmaceutical quality investigations (OOS/OOT)
pain_description: Out-of-spec results trigger Phase I/II investigations; root cause + CAPA in 30 days; misses bring Form 483.
santifer_pattern: OOS intake + LLM investigation agent + CAPA

title: SaaS ML + data science experiments tracking
pain_description: Dozens of runs/week; hyperparams + metrics + notebooks scattered; reproducibility nightmare.
santifer_pattern: Run log + LLM report + experiment recommender

title: Chemistry manufacturing (CMO) tech transfer
pain_description: Transferring process from R&D to CMO site: batch records + SOP + validation. dozens of docs per campaign.
santifer_pattern: Dev data + CMO receiver + LLM batch-record generator

title: Genomic variant classification + interpretation
pain_description: Each variant needs classification (ACMG); literature search + family history + functional data. hours per variant.
santifer_pattern: Variant + literature RAG + ACMG rules + draft classification

title: Bench scientist literature keep-up
pain_description: Publications outpace reading; competitive signals missed; 'stay current' is a second job.
santifer_pattern: Topic feed + LLM digest + competitive alert

title: Animal study protocol + IACUC submission
pain_description: IACUC protocols + amendments + annual reviews; institutional requirements vary; 2-3 month review cycles.
santifer_pattern: Protocol template + LLM drafter + comparison against approved

title: Compound screening + hit triage in HTS
pain_description: High-throughput screens yield 1000s of hits; triage by potency + ADMET + novelty = days of committee time.
santifer_pattern: Hit data + ADMET + LLM triage memo

title: Food / cosmetic ingredient safety substantiation
pain_description: Each ingredient needs safety file per market (FDA, EU, China); claims must be substantiated; recalls ruin brands.
santifer_pattern: Ingredient + market + LLM safety-memo

title: Biotech investor reporting (B-corp + NAV)
pain_description: Quarterly updates to biotech investors; R&D burn + milestones + cash runway; board pack + 10-Q.
santifer_pattern: Milestone + burn + LLM narrator + board deck

title: Pharma market access: payer dossier prep
pain_description: AMCP dossier + NICE submission + ICER response. hundreds of pages per drug per payer.
santifer_pattern: Clinical data + economic model + LLM dossier drafter

title: Medical affairs: scientific literature response
pain_description: Physician asks for data on drug X vs Y; MSL searches literature + internal data; response takes days.
santifer_pattern: Literature RAG + internal data + LLM response drafter

title: Academic research: IRB/ethics submission
pain_description: IRB protocols + informed consents + updates; each revision triggers re-review; research delays.
santifer_pattern: Protocol + LLM drafter + cmp prior approvals

title: Research computing: cluster job queuing + failure diagnosis
pain_description: Slurm / PBS jobs fail obscurely; logs scattered; user reruns blindly.
santifer_pattern: Log parse + LLM root cause + retry rec

title: Chemistry safety data sheet (SDS) generation + updates
pain_description: SDS per chemical per market; updates when regs change; manufacturers maintain 1000s.
santifer_pattern: Chemical + reg feed + LLM SDS generator

title: Academic tech transfer office license agreements
pain_description: Patent portfolio + licensees + royalty audits. deals over decades; data rot.
santifer_pattern: Deal SSOT + royalty calc + audit pack

title: Medical device 510(k) / PMA submission
pain_description: 510(k): thousands of pages; predicate device comparison; FDA Q&A rounds; 6-9 month cycle.
santifer_pattern: Device + predicate DB + LLM drafter + gap analyzer

title: Contract manufacturing quality agreement management
pain_description: QAs with CMOs: 50-100 page agreements; change control coordination; audits annually.
santifer_pattern: QA + change control agent + audit scheduler

title: Clinical laboratory test development + validation
pain_description: LDT (lab-developed test) validation per CLIA + NY State; FDA changes creating new obligations.
santifer_pattern: Validation protocol + LLM doc pack + regulatory filing

title: Medical writing: clinical study reports (CSR)
pain_description: Phase 3 CSR = 500+ pages, ICH E3 structure; quarter-long effort per study.
santifer_pattern: TLFs + data + template + LLM CSR drafter

title: Cell therapy manufacturing batch records (CAR-T)
pain_description: Each autologous batch = individual patient record; chain-of-identity + chain-of-custody; vein-to-vein track.
santifer_pattern: Patient-batch SSOT + LLM BMR + recall-ready

title: Clinical trial monitoring visit report
pain_description: CRA visits sites, writes 10-20 page monitoring reports; auditable; takes days per visit.
santifer_pattern: Source data + CRA notes + LLM report drafter

title: Investigator initiated trial administration
pain_description: Academic PI writes protocol + IRB + grant + enrolls + analyzes + publishes; no infra support.
santifer_pattern: Protocol + IRB + EDC + biostats + paper drafter

title: Clinical pharmacology PK/PD modeling
pain_description: Population PK/PD models + NONMEM coding + regulatory modeling report = specialist bottleneck.
santifer_pattern: Data + LLM model suggester + code generator

title: Digital health SaMD / cybersecurity 510(k) addendum
pain_description: FDA Software as Medical Device guidance + cybersecurity documentation (SBOM, threat model); app updates delayed.
santifer_pattern: Code + risk model + LLM doc pack

title: Post-market surveillance + MDR/MAUDE reporting
pain_description: Every complaint → evaluate reportability → FDA MAUDE / EU MDR within timelines; misses trigger warning.
santifer_pattern: Complaint + LLM classifier + MDR filer

title: Scientific figure + illustration production
pain_description: High-quality publication figures take hours in Illustrator; journal formats + colors strict.
santifer_pattern: Data + journal spec + LLM figure generator

title: Clinical site feasibility assessment
pain_description: Choose 50 sites from 500 candidates: historical enrollment + therapeutic fit + facility; survey-heavy.
santifer_pattern: Site DB + LLM fit scorer + outreach agent

title: Pharma sales territory + HCP targeting
pain_description: Prescriber targeting from claims data + rep call plans; quarterly reshuffles.
santifer_pattern: Claims + prescriber + LLM territory optimizer

title: AI research paper reproduction + benchmarking
pain_description: Reproducing paper results: code unavailable / partial / deprecated; benchmarks rot.
santifer_pattern: Paper + code scrape + LLM reproducer + benchmark runner

title: Toxicology study report writing
pain_description: GLP tox reports 200-500 pages; data + narrative + QA; each study takes months.
santifer_pattern: Tox data + template + LLM drafter

title: Biologics CMC: cell-line + analytical method validation
pain_description: Cell-line characterization + method validation across 4+ USP chapters; regulatory queries reopen.
santifer_pattern: Validation data + USP rules + LLM doc generator

title: Environmental testing lab: sample chain-of-custody
pain_description: EPA-compliance samples: chain-of-custody + holding times + NELAP certs; paper or poor LIMS.
santifer_pattern: Sample SSOT + mobile intake + chain + report

title: CAR-T apheresis scheduling + coordination
pain_description: Apheresis → manufacture → infusion: patient + hospital + manufacturer windows must align; any miss = 4 weeks delay.
santifer_pattern: Multi-party calendar + LLM orchestrator + contingency

title: Pharma contract operations: rebates + chargebacks
pain_description: Medicaid rebates + 340B + GPO chargebacks = 10%+ of revenue; errors millions.
santifer_pattern: Claims + contracts + LLM reconcile + dispute agent

title: Open-science / preprint server spam moderation
pain_description: Spam + low-quality submissions + retractions; moderators volunteer; overwhelmed.
santifer_pattern: Submission + LLM quality + spam + retraction workflow

title: Research lab ordering + freezer inventory
pain_description: Reagents + antibodies + freezer samples; duplicate ordering; expired reagents waste.
santifer_pattern: Inventory + voice log + order agent

title: Research data sharing compliance (GDPR + HIPAA + 21 CFR 11)
pain_description: Sharing research data across institutions = data-use agreements + de-identification + audit.
santifer_pattern: DUA + de-id agent + audit

title: Medical education + CME accreditation tracking
pain_description: ACCME rules complex; credit tracking + faculty disclosures + commercial-support conflicts.
santifer_pattern: Activity + disclosure + LLM conflict detector

title: Pharma market research transcription + coding
pain_description: Physician interview audio → transcript → thematic coding → insights deck. weeks per study.
santifer_pattern: Audio + ASR + LLM coder + insights agent
